# ADR-007 Skip One Gate Only

<!-- adr-kit-lint: skip completeness -->

## Status

Accepted, 2026-04-25.

## Context

Synthetic fixture: marker skips only the completeness gate; other gates still run.

## Decision

Should not be flagged for missing canonical sections (skipped), but consistency still applies.

## Alternatives Considered

- None.

## Consequences

Used to verify per-gate skip directives.

## Related Decisions

- None.
